description: Web-based PS5 management dashboard - launch games, cheats, install homebrew and PKGs, file transfer, fan control, and offline account activation. Self-contained with bundled Lapy JB Daemon (no etaHEN needed). WebUI on port 6969.

changelog: **Root cause**: `fanThreshold`/`fanTarget` were defined in `App` but never passed as props to the `Settings` component — every toggle call was `/api/fan/set?temp=undefined`, and the toggle silently did nothing. Fixed.
Disabling fan override now persists across Arsenal restarts — `/api/fan/unpin` now calls `config_save()` so `fan_threshold=0` is written to disk.
Fan watcher already re-applies the pinned threshold every 15 s to fight the firmware's automatic reset on game launch (was always there, now actually reachable).
`config.ini` had been silently corrupting itself in a loop:
`stringifyINI` turned flat C keys (`fan_threshold=0`) into character-indexed INI sections (`[fan_threshold] / 0=4 / 1=0`).
`config_preserve_ui_sections` faithfully re-copied every section it found — including the garbage ones.
Repeat forever.
Both sides fixed:
**`stringifyINI`** now writes root-level primitives (flat C-backend keys) as verbatim `key=value` lines before emitting any `[Section]` blocks.

**`config_preserve_ui_sections`** switched from deny-list to **allow-list** — only `[Settings]`, `[Sentinel]`, `[Experimental]`, `[CustomPaths]`, `[Blacklist]`, `[AutoPayloads]`, `[PKG]` are preserved. Garbage sections and the legacy `[FanControl]` block are silently dropped on every save.
**PS5 browser loads ~50× faster** — JSX + Tailwind precompiled at build time. 547 KB inline HTML → 11 KB shell + separately cached 519 KB `app.js`.
**Mobile layout** — clean responsive layout on phones (iOS Safari, Android Chrome): bottom nav, 2-column portrait grid, proper touch targets. Desktop unchanged.
**Mobile game cards** — info/favorites/hide quick-action buttons on phones. Hidden on PS5 and desktop.
**FW 12 execute-only page fix** — `mprotect()` before `pt_copyout()` makes SHN/MC4 cheats work on FW 8.40+ including FW 12.
Full in-browser file manager under the **Files** tab — browse, copy, move, delete across `/data`, `/user`, `/system_data`, USB/ext.
**NomadicDNS (`62.210.38.117`) is retired and no longer works.** Use `127.0.0.1` (nanoDNS, bundled, on by default).
**Network not connecting after JB?** Wait for Arsenal to start, then **Settings → Network → turn off then on**.
nc -q0 <PS5_IP> 9021 < elf-arsenal.elf
**FW Spoof fix**: payload now applies the version you enter (e.g. `9.60`) — previously hardcoded `99.99` and ignored your input
**klogsrv visibility**: fw-spoof output now goes to stderr and appears in the klog viewer
**UI clarification**: `ps4_sdk_version` and `upd_version` are patched (games/update checks); PS5 Settings "System Software" reads a separate sysctl and is unaffected
**DPI fix from v1.6.5** still applies (10.xx/11.xx authid + timing)

**Root cause:** DPI v1 calls `sceAppInstUtilInitialize()` at startup before kstuff has launched and patched the kernel. The 10-second timeout fired first → `init_rc = -0xDEAD` → all installs silently failed. On FW 11.00+, `SYSTEM_AUTHID` is also required and was never set on the spawned DPI process.
**Fixes:**
DPI v1: 25 s startup sleep so kstuff is ready before AppInstUtil init
DPI v1: lazy retry on each failed install request (catches late IPMI)
DPI v1 + v2: Arsenal now calls `jb_escalate_pid()` after spawning DPI (same pattern as CheatRunner) — grants `SYSTEM_AUTHID` for FW 11.xx+
DPI v2: bind retry with backoff instead of silent immediate exit
Both: diagnostic stderr logs now visible in klogsrv
**Previous releases also in this build:**
fw-spoof 10.xx KP fix (8-byte needle + scan limit)
Toggle toasts fixed (lapyjb/CheatRunner/FPKGGuard/DPIv2)

**Cheat game list fix**: After a full repo download, the staged-cheat game list was always empty because `list_cheats()` only scanned the flat root — all downloaded files live in `json/`/`shn/`/`mc4/` subdirs. Now scans all four paths; 3000+ titles correctly appear.

**Format selector tabs**: When multiple formats exist for a game (e.g. SHN + MC4), tab buttons appear above the cheat list so you can pick which version to load. Example: Dead Space SHN → 1 cheat, MC4 → 10 cheats. Tabs are hidden for single-format games.
Global toggle + per-patch enable/disable across all three CheatRunner scan dirs
Upload new XML patch files from the browser
Source badges (Arsenal / CheatRunner / CheatRunner PS5)
Drop `.elf` files into `/data/elf-arsenal/plugins/` and manage them from Settings
DPI v2 (etaHEN-compatible HTTP installer on port 12800) bundled
Switch between DPI v1 (loopback :9040) and DPI v2 (HTTP :12800) from Settings → PKG Installer → DPI version
Mutual exclusion: switching version SIGKILLs the old daemon before starting the new one
DPI version choice persists across reboots via config.ini
Accurate DPI status badge (v1/v2/not running)
i18n on all pages + full Google Translate language list
**Author:** StonedModder
| Project                        | Description                                                                 | Key Features                                                                 |

| Ghostpad | PS5 payload for virtual controller creation and input redirection over TCP | • Virtual DualSense emulation
• Real-time input redirection from PC
• Full WebUI tab for controller management |

| PS5-SystemStateManager | Payload for triggering various PS5 system power and media states | • Shutdown
• Reboot
• Rest Mode
• Disc Eject |

| ps5-beeper-LED-Controller | Tools to control the PS5 console beeper and LED brightness | • Beeper volume & pattern control
• LED brightness adjustment
• Mute beeper |

| HID-Dumper | Payload and GUI for monitoring and capturing HID controller input data | • Live input monitoring
• Button, stick, and trigger data capture
• Useful for research and debugging |
| Change                  | Description                                                      |

Auto-cut for the offline pack zip. See commit 842119f. Pack contains: kstuff (3 sources), SMP 1.6test11, Linux loader v2.1, Y2JB autoloader, tile pkg, OffAct+PKGInstall, 3 cheat repos, manifest. FTP the zip to /data/elf-arsenal-offline-pack.zip then Settings -> Offline pack -> Extract now.
First Elf Arsenal release.
Rebrand from Sonic Loader
Baked-in PS5 Linux loader (v2.1) for first-boot install on FW ≤ 6.02
np-fake-signout payload (preserves username + accountId)
Background-services JSON fix (toggles hit /api/state now)
Trophy UDS daemon defaults to OFF; legacy launcher-patch defaults ON
Auto-apply patches nested into the Cheat engine settings section
nanoDNS gate on every boot-time HTTP poller
One-shot sonic-loader.elf -> elf-arsenal.elf migration for upgrading users
SDK update to v0.39 (clang 19.1.7)
⚠ This is a pre-release version. Use with caution.
**Cheats persist across game restart** — enabled cheats are automatically re-applied when a game (re)launches.
**SHN/MC4 toggle state is saved** in a sidecar; those formats previously remembered nothing.
**Engine auto-enables on toggle** — toggling a cheat while a game is running turns the engine on, so cheats just work (no more "cheat engine is disabled" failures).
**Fixed the home-screen Cheats button** (CheatsModal), which spoke the removed CheatRunner port-7010 contract — rewired to the native engine.
Auto-patches no longer require the master cheat-engine toggle.
**"Show Notifications" now works** — a PS5 toast fires on game launch/exit.
Backend `config_save()` no longer wipes UI-managed config sections.
`get_running_game()` cached/serialized — fixes multi-second stalls of the cheats list under a running game.
Repair Icons and Force Rescan also run the extracted-folder game scan; removed the standalone scan card.
⚠ This is a pre-release version. Use with caution.
Fixes the home-screen tile auto-install:

It used to skip whenever leftover tile metadata existed, so a console that lost the real tile (empty /user/app, stale appmeta) never got it back and nothing downloaded. It now checks for the actual app package, so a broken/half install repairs itself while a healthy one is left alone.
Points the download at the canonical pkg path.
Verified on FW 12.00: the tile downloads and installs via the download manager with no crash.
Game Build Info

The game info modal now shows a Build Info row read from the title's param.json: required firmware, the SDK it was built with, content version and DRM type. Works for installed and extracted folder games (including ones that need a higher firmware than the console).
Inserted-disc tiles
A disc that's inserted but not installed (e.g. it needs a higher firmware) now gets its own library tile instead of being invisible.

Required firmware and master/pubtools versions are read from the disc's own param.json. The game name is resolved by titleId from the public patch databases (PPSA → prosperopatches.com, CUSA → orbispatches.com) and cached to disk, so it only looks up once and degrades quietly without DNS.
The exact SDK version and cover art stay sealed in the encrypted disc package until the game is installed.
Interface language

Fixed the text flicker (English↔translated) on System Settings and other auto-refreshing pages. Cached translations are now restored instantly on re-render instead of flashing English; only brand-new strings hit the network once before being cached.
Any filename with an extension (auth.dat, save.pkg, config.json, …) is left untranslated.
Cheats

The cheat engine now also reads .json/.shn/.mc4 cheat and patch files from the legacy CheatRunner folders (/data/cheatrunner/cheats and /data/cheatrunner/patches), so cheats carried over from older builds work without moving any files.
Sentinel Warden
Per-game custom pause delays and the game whitelist now actually take effect — whitelisted titles are left alone, and custom delays override the global default on game launch/exit.
Fixed config persistence: web-UI config sections were being silently dropped on save; they now save and reload correctly, and Sentinel rules survive a config rewrite and reboot.

Homebrew Launcher: new "Homebrew" tab in the left pane spawns the bundled ps5-payload homebrew launcher (websrv on :8080) on open and embeds it inside the app, with the menu intact. Interface language: replaced the native dropdown with a searchable, React-controlled picker that no longer closes before you can pick, and game titles (including the home-screen hero) plus brand words like Homebrew are never translated. Payload upload fixed (was "failed to fetch" — wrong endpoint): .elf uploads now work via /api/payloads/upload. Also includes the v1.6.12 baked-in extracted-game mounter and the "Currently Playing" hero fix.

Baked-in extracted-game mounter: registers folder-method (sce_sys) games on the XMB with icons, no ShadowMountPlus install required — ports SMP's engine (read titleId from param.json, remount /system_ex rw, nullfs-mount to /system_ex/app/<id>, stage appmeta, FW12 AppInstallAll). Runs on boot and via System Tools. Hero now correctly locks to "Currently Playing" (was gated behind cheats) and the title no longer clips. Working Repair Icons / Force Rescan, app.db icon/metadata repair (backup-first, FW12-safe), thorough fpkg force-unlock. Interface language picker in System Tools (full Google-Translate set, auto-matches console language, persistent override). Native PKG Zone, avatar current-image fix, File Commander renamed to File Manager, old standalone file-manager assets removed.

Working Repair Icons / Force Rescan buttons (were POSTing to no-op GET stubs that did nothing): Repair Icons now reloads the home-screen icons, Force Rescan re-registers missing fpkg titles, both toast the real result. Native glass PKG Zone (replaces broken iframe). Avatar changer shows your current avatar. Hero card no longer clips long titles. FW 12 fix for the lastAccessTime column error. Thorough fpkg force-unlock (clears BSD immutable/no-unlink flags + chmod 0777) fixes "cannot delete" PS4 titles; 0555 fpkg-guard lock disabled. Mounter scan paths now mirror ShadowMountPlus and the "no images found" notification is accurate.

Fixes the PKGManager crash (storage ReferenceError) from v1.6.9. Includes USB drive usage, real users/rename, native avatar set, line-by-line log viewer, hero info modal, PKG drive detection, Supporters modal.
